# Purchase Reception Status

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:6876d17a7f2d855618a63d7beeef66f0b4419b2715fe13edf4df2ec60c9e3fbe
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds a field *Receipt Status* on purchase order lines.
On a confirmed purchase order, it can have 3 different values:

- Nothing Received
- Partially Received
- Fully Received

The field is updated automatically when the purchase order is confirmed,
and when the move lines are updated.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module, you need to go to Purchase Orders and create a new order.
